prestazioni: Engine swap to a Mitsubishi 4A31T (660cc turbocharged inline-4, 64mm bore x 60mm stroke) with forged internals: JE Pistons 8.5:1 compression forged slugs, Eagle H-beam connecting rods, and a billet crankshaft from Tomei for 12,000 RPM stability. Pair with a Garrett GT1549S turbo (0.49 A/R, 54mm compressor wheel) on a custom 3-inch stainless steel manifold by HKS, feeding into a GReddy Profec B Spec II boost controller for 1.5 bar peak pressure.

Full standalone Haltech Elite 2500 ECU with custom wiring harness by Power Enterprise, integrating a Motec C125 dash for real-time data logging. Fuel system upgrade includes a Walbro 450 LPH in-tank pump, Injector Dynamics ID1000x injectors, and a Tomei Type-S fuel pressure regulator for precise AFR control under high load.

Suspension overhaul with Tein Flex Z coilovers (adjustable damping, 18-way rebound, 12-way compression) paired with Cusco 22mm front and 20mm rear sway bars. Chassis reinforcement via a Cusco bolt-in 4-point roll cage and a Whiteline front strut tower brace to eliminate flex. Braking system features DBA 5000 Series rotors (280mm front, 240mm rear) with Ferodo DS2500 pads and braided stainless steel lines from Goodridge.
estetica: Custom widebody conversion using a Liberty Walk LB Works kit (Pajero Mini-specific, bolt-on fenders with 50mm flares) paired with a Rocket Bunny rear duckbill spoiler for downforce. Front bumper replaced with a Seibon carbon fiber unit featuring integrated LED fog lights and a tow hook delete for weight savings.

OEM+ interior refresh with Bride Zeta III bucket seats (fixed-back, FIA-approved) wrapped in Nismo Alcantara with red stitching, paired with a NRG Innovations quick-release steering wheel hub and a Momo Prototipo wheel. Full custom roll cage padding by Sabelt in red to match the exterior accents.

Exterior lighting upgraded to Philips Ultinon Pro9000 LED headlights (H4 bulbs, 6500K) with a custom Hella 500FF driving light bar mounted on a Cusco roof rack. Paint scheme: Mitsubishi Racing Lancer Evolution VI Rally Art green with matte black accents, applied via a 3-stage PPG process for durability.
